sections.title: General
rules: 12-team league, head-to-head scoring format
Regular season runs Weeks 1 through 14
Playoffs run Weeks 15 through 17 (top 6 qualify)
Consolation bracket for eliminated teams
Commissioner has final say on disputes

sections.title: Roster & Lineup
rules: Roster positions: QB, WR, WR, RB, RB, TE, FLEX, K, DEF, BN (6), IR (1)
Lineup locks at individual game kickoff times
Players on bye must be benched or moved to an open slot
Failure to set your lineup is your own fault

sections.title: Waivers & Free Agency
rules: Waiver priority resets weekly (inverse of standings)
Waivers process Wednesday at 12:00 AM PT
After waivers clear, free agents are first-come-first-served
No FAAB in this league (standard waiver priority)

sections.title: Trades
rules: Trade deadline: Week 12
Trades are subject to a 2-day review period
Commissioner can veto only in cases of obvious collusion
No trade-backs within the same week

sections.title: Payouts
rules: $150 buy-in per team
1st Place: $800
2nd Place: $340
3rd Place: $200
All dues must be paid before the draft

sections.title: Last Place Punishment
rules: Last place finisher in the consolation bracket receives a punishment
Punishments are decided by league vote before the season
The loser must complete the punishment within 30 days of season end
Photographic or video evidence is required and will be posted to the Wall of Shame

notes: Rules are updated annually before the draft. Edit this file to reflect your league's actual rules.
